zh.lifeSummary: 當King Einion ab Owain於0935年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安代洛時，他的父親Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth25歲，母親Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys17歲。他於大約0952年與Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於0984年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Einion ab Owain于0935年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安代洛时，他的父亲Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth25岁，母亲Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys17岁。他于大约0952年与Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于0984年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eberhard.
Swedish: soldier's name, apparently from ax ‘ear (i.e. the part of a cereal plant which contains its flowers or seeds)’.

variants.name: Akes
meanings: German: possibly a variant of Ax . The surname Akes is virtually non-existing in Germany.

variants.name: Axt
meanings: German: metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, carpenter, or maker of axes, from Middle High German ackes, axt- ‘axe’.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When King Einion ab Owain was born in 0935, in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, was 25 and his mother, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, was 17. He married Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan about 0952, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 0984, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.Dynevor Castle,Llandilo,Carmarthenshire,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Einion ab Owain est né en 0935, à Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan environ 0952, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 0984, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.Dynevor Castle,Llandilo,Carmarthenshire,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als King Einion ab Owain 0935 in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth 25 und seine Mutter Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys 17. Er hat um 0952 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 0984 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.Dynevor Castle,Llandilo,Carmarthenshire,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando King Einion ab Owain è nato il nel 0935 nel Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan circa 0952, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 0984, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Einion ab Owainが0935年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデイロで生まれた時，父Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarthは25歳，母Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powysは17歳であった。約0952年にイギリスイギリスデボンでQueen Nest ferch Gwerystanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は0984年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Einion ab Owain(이)가 0935년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜데이로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 0952년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0984년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Dynevor Castle,Llandilo,Carmarthenshire,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Einion ab Owain nasceu em 0935, em Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan aproximadamente 0952, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 0984, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ro.Dynevor Castle,Llandilo,Carmarthenshire,: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Einion ab Owain родился в 0935 г. в местности лландилоу, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan около 0952 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 0984 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Einion ab Owain nació en 0935, en Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Owain Ap Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Queen Angharad Ferch Llywelyn, Of Powys, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Queen Nest ferch Gwerystan aproximadamente 0952, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 0984, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
